text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning on a day off, I walk by the dance
studio and see Mejiro Bright inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, fooour—hup, hup. ♪
choice_data_list: Practicing alone on a day off? Impressive!
Practicing alone on a day off? Impressive!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. You're up early this morning too, I see. I
wished to see if I could memorize the
choreography for a new dance routine today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting ready with a warm-up right now.
choice_data_list: You sure are diligent about practicing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
No, not so. I'm just slower than the others. It
takes me more time to remember my
choreography.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I want to give the audience a proper
performance during my winning concerts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: After all, I am a member of the celebrated Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, then. Here's to a wonderful day for us both.
Farewell for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just after the sun sets, I remember a few minor
things I need to take care of at my office. On my
way back, I pass by the dance studio again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, fooour—hup, hup. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You're the same trainer who passed by
before, no? Have you been well?
choice_data_list:
I have been, thanks. Are you cooling down for
the day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Cooling down? Goodness, is it already this late?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whoopsie. Looks like I got carried away doing my
warm-up.
choice_data_list: You've been warming up since this morning?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I wanted to be thoroughly prepared,
since I was going to learn new choreography.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But now I don't have enough time to do any
actual dancing anymore. What should I do?
choice_data_list:
You could focus on the parts that most concern
you.
Give the entire dance a quick run-through.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I see. That's a wonderful idea. Well then, I'll do
just that and focus on the parts I find most
difficult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Bright finally begins her
rehearsal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's a fine suggestion. Acquainting oneself with
the choreography as a whole is never a bad idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll give it a try now. Thank you so much for your
thoughtful advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Bright finally begins her
rehearsal.
